# Step 02 — PO Detail (FC View Mode)

**Persona:** FC (Financial Controller)
**Module:** 2
**Section:** 2.1
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid`

---

## 2.1 Access Path

From Step 01 — My Approval: click any PO number link in the table.

---

## 2.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> detail["2. PO Detail — View Mode"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode — Approval Actions"]
    edit --> done(["PO Approved / Returned / Rejected"])
    style detail fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 2.3 Screen Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← │ PO20260400018  [IN PROGRESS]              [Edit] [Comment] │
│     Type : Manual                                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Date          │ Buyer                │ Department               │
│ 2026-04-08    │ ศิริวรรณ Purchase ทองดี│ Guest Service and Bell   │
├───────────────┴─────────────────────┴──────────────────────────┤
│ Workflow *          │ Delivery Date *   │ Currency *  Exchange   │
│ [General     ▼]    │ [📅 2026-04-09]   │ [THB  ▼]   1.00000 THB│
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Vendor *                              │ Credit Term             │
│ [P004 - PETTY CASH PURCHASE - DPP ▼] │ [Select Credit Term ▼]  │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Description                           │ Remarks                 │
│ [Optional                        ]    │ [Optional          ]    │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ✅ Previous        ●  Current         ○ Next                   │
│  Create Request     FC                 Completed                │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Items (1)                                                       │
│ ☐ # │ Status  │ Product            │ Qty │ Unit│ Price │ Total │
│ ──  ┼─────────┼────────────────────┼─────┼─────┼───────┼────── │
│ ☐ 1 │[PENDING]│ Aluminum Mop Base… │ 323 │ PCS │122.00 │39,406 │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Subtotal 39,406.00 │ Discount 0.00 │ Net 39,406.00 │ Total    │
│                                               39,406.00 THB   │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

![PO Detail — IN PROGRESS view mode (FC perspective)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 2.4 Header Fields (all read-only in view mode)

| Field | Description | Edit Permission |
|-------|-------------|-----------------|
| PO Number | Auto-generated PO identifier | View Only |
| Status badge | IN PROGRESS / DRAFT | View Only |
| Type | PO creation method (Manual / From PR / From Price List) | View Only |
| Date | PO creation date | View Only |
| Buyer | Name of the purchasing staff who created the PO | View Only |
| Department | Buyer's department | View Only |
| Workflow | Approval workflow selected (e.g. "General") | View Only — disabled dropdown |
| Delivery Date | Expected delivery date | View Only — disabled date picker |
| Currency | PO currency | View Only — disabled dropdown |
| Exchange Rate | Exchange rate at time of PO creation | View Only — disabled text field |
| Vendor | Vendor name and code | View Only — disabled lookup button |
| Credit Term | Payment terms | View Only — disabled dropdown |
| Description | Optional free-text description | View Only |
| Remarks | Optional remarks | View Only |

---

## 2.5 Workflow Tracker

The workflow tracker shows the PO's position in the approval chain:

| Node | Label | Appearance | Meaning |
|------|-------|------------|---------|
| Previous | Create Request | ✅ Green checkmark circle | Step completed |
| Current | FC | 🔵 Solid blue circle | FC is the active approver |
| Next | Completed | ⭕ Empty grey circle | Pending FC decision |

---

## 2.6 Items Table (view mode)

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| ☐ (checkbox) | Selection checkbox — visible but inactive in view mode |
| # | Item sequence number |
| Status | Item-level approval status (PENDING / APPROVED / REVIEW / REJECTED) |
| Product | Product name and description (two lines) |
| Order Qty | Quantity ordered |
| Unit | Unit of measure |
| Unit Price | Price per unit |
| Disc % | Discount percentage |
| Tax | Tax percentage |
| Net Amount | Qty × Unit Price × (1 - Disc%) |
| Tax Amt | Tax amount |
| Total | Net Amount + Tax Amt |
| Details | Link to item detail popup |

**Item Status values:**

| Status | Badge Color | Meaning |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| PENDING | Blue | Awaiting FC review |
| APPROVED | Green | FC approved this item |
| REVIEW | Yellow/Orange | FC flagged for review — to be returned to purchaser |
| REJECTED | Red | FC rejected this item |

---

## 2.7 Action Buttons (view mode)

| Button | Color | Purpose |
|--------|-------|---------|
| Edit | Blue (outline with pencil icon) | Enter edit mode to take approval actions |
| Comment | Blue (outline with chat icon) | Open comment sidebar |

---

## 2.8 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | FC can view all PO fields but cannot edit any header field | FC approval role permission |
| BR-02 | FC must enter Edit mode to take approval actions | Approval UX pattern |
| BR-03 | Workflow tracker always shows the full chain: Create Request → FC → Completed | Workflow configuration |
| BR-04 | Item checkboxes are visible in view mode but cannot be selected | UI design — editing disabled outside edit mode |

---

## 2.9 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| FC opens a DRAFT PO from My Approval | Same view mode; Edit button available but no approval actions on items |
| PO has multiple items | Items table lists all items with individual status badges |
| Workflow has more than 3 steps (multi-level approval) | Tracker shows all steps; FC node is highlighted blue |
| PO was returned by FC (status: DRAFT again) | FC may still see it in My Approval if re-submitted |
| Comment sidebar opened | Sidebar slides in from right; main content shifts left |
| FC navigates back | Returns to My Approval list (browser back button or ← icon) |

---

## 2.10 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click ← (back) | Step 01 — My Approval |
| Click Edit | Step 03 — Edit Mode / Approval Actions |
| Click Comment | Opens comment/attachment sidebar (same page) |
| Click Details (item row) | Item detail popup (inventory info, related PR) |

---

## 2.11 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` | Load PO detail |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/items` | Load item list |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/comments` | Load comments |
